prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the END of "Item 9A. Controls and Procedures". The next section is "Item 9B. Other Information".
Transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of "Item 9A" body text before the next item begins:
if the "Item 9B" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 9A continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page (ignore running headers, page numbers, footers).
Respond with ONLY a JSON object: {"lines": ["line 1", "line 2", ...]}
